title: Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs * African American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs * African American Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community At Risk Families No Filter African American Community At Risk Families Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT NORTH EAST HEALTH CENTER AND DENTAL CLINIC HEALTHY BIRTH INITIATIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home visits, health education, and support groups from pregnancy through the child's second year. Offers reduced-cost car seats, as well as certified assistance in installation. 5329 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Home visiting services: Pregnant African American women who are less than 18 weeks gestation. Those over 18 weeks gestation can still participate in support groups and classes. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:30pm (503) 988-3387 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HEALTHY BIRTH INITIATIVE
